q: What type of food do you serve?
a: Fresh seafood, sushi rolls, pasta, prime chops, and Mediterranean-inspired dishes. Standouts include our lamb chops, Solemar roll, ceviche tacos, and lobster mac & cheese.
Open daily — Monday to Thursday noon to 10:30pm, Friday to Sunday noon to 11pm.
West Bay Street, Nassau. Free off-street parking is available on site.
Yes — reservations are strongly recommended, especially for weekend evenings and sunset seating. Book via WhatsApp or our website.
Yes! We have beautiful oceanfront outdoor seating — perfect for catching the Nassau sunset over the water.

q: Is it good for a birthday or special occasion?
a: Absolutely. We love helping celebrate special moments. Let us know in advance and we'll make it memorable.
Yes, we have vegetarian-friendly dishes on the menu. Let your server know your preferences and they'll guide you.
Yes, gluten-free options are available. Please inform your server when you arrive.
Yes — we offer private dining for events and can accommodate large groups. Contact us in advance to arrange your group size and date.

q: What are your most popular dishes?
a: Our most loved dishes are the lamb chops, the Solemar sushi roll, the ceviche tacos, and the lobster mac & cheese. The fried snapper is also a favourite.

q: Do you have a full bar?
a: Yes, we have a full bar including cocktails, wine, beer, and spirits. Try the Solemar sangria — guests love it.
Smart casual. Come comfortable but neat — no swimwear or bare feet in the dining room.
Yes, we do takeout. WhatsApp us your order and we'll confirm your pickup time.

q: How much does it cost to dine here?
a: We are in the $$ to $$$ range. Mains typically run $30–$65. The quality and oceanfront setting make it well worth it.
Yes — free off-street parking is available directly at the restaurant.

q: Is it good for couples or romantic dinners?
a: One of the best spots in Nassau for a romantic dinner. The sunset ocean view, warm lighting, and exceptional service set the mood perfectly.

q: What is the best time to come for the sunset?
a: Aim for a table around 6:30–7pm for the best Nassau sunset views over the water. We recommend booking ahead for these prime slots.
Yes — our sushi rolls are a guest favourite. The Solemar roll and the lobster-topped rolls are highly recommended.

q: Is the restaurant good for business meetings?
a: Yes — we have a private dining area suitable for business lunches and meetings. Great atmosphere for client entertaining.
Yes, free WiFi is available for all guests.
Yes, highchairs are available for young children.
Yes — we accept Visa and Mastercard as well as cash.
Yes, gift cards are available. A great gift for a Nassau dining experience!

q: Can I host a private event or function?
a: Yes, we offer private dining for events, celebrations, and corporate functions. Contact us with your date, guest count, and requirements.
Yes — the restaurant is wheelchair accessible.
Yes, brunch is available. Check with us for current brunch menu and hours.
Yes — please inform us of any allergies when booking and remind your server on arrival. Our kitchen will do its best to accommodate you.
Absolutely. Fresh, locally-sourced seafood is the foundation of our menu. It's what we're known for.

q: Can I request a specific table or area?
a: You can note a preference when booking — outdoor/waterfront, indoor, or a quieter area. We'll do our best to accommodate.

q: How long does a meal typically take?
a: A full dinner with drinks is typically 90 minutes to 2 hours. We never rush our guests.
We occasionally feature live music — follow our social media or ask us when booking for upcoming entertainment nights.
Currently we offer takeout only. WhatsApp us your order and pick up at a confirmed time.

q: What is the best dish to order?
a: Our server will always give you a personal recommendation but the lamb chops, Solemar roll, and fried snapper are consistently our most raved-about dishes.
Yes — we have a dessert menu. Ask your server for today's selection.

q: Is the restaurant open on public holidays?
a: Generally yes, though hours may vary on certain public holidays. WhatsApp us to confirm before visiting.

q: Can I bring my own wine or cake?
a: Please message us in advance for our corkage and outside cake policies.

q: Do you have a loyalty or rewards programme?
a: Not currently, but we love regulars and our team will always remember your preferences! Ask about any current promotions.

q: How do I book a table?
a: Just reply here on WhatsApp with your preferred date, time, and number of guests and we'll get you booked in.

q: What makes Solemar different from other Nassau restaurants?
a: The combination of a breathtaking oceanfront sunset view, consistently fresh seafood, and genuinely attentive personal service — guests say it's unlike anywhere else in Nassau.
